'''鈭歴h-g-g''' ('''shagaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:byrl|byrl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byrl|byrl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-g-g
|-
! Lemma
| shagaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagagithi|shagagithi]] || [[word:shagagiji|shagagiji]] || [[word:shagagishi|shagagishi]] || [[word:shagagi|shagagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagaguthuth|shagaguthuth]] || [[word:shagagujuj|shagagujuj]] || [[word:shagagushush|shagagushush]] || [[word:shagag|shagag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagaguthu|shagaguthu]] || [[word:shagaguju|shagaguju]] || [[word:shagagushu|shagagushu]] || [[word:shagagu|shagagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagagufuth|shagagufuth]] || [[word:shagagufuj|shagagufuj]] || [[word:shagagufush|shagagufush]] || [[word:shagaguf|shagaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagagethe|shagagethe]] || [[word:shagageje|shagageje]] || [[word:shagageshe|shagageshe]] || [[word:shagage|shagage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagagothoth|shagagothoth]] || [[word:shagagojoj|shagagojoj]] || [[word:shagagoshosh|shagagoshosh]] || [[word:shagag|shagag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagagotho|shagagotho]] || [[word:shagagojo|shagagojo]] || [[word:shagagosho|shagagosho]] || [[word:shagago|shagago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagagofoth|shagagofoth]] || [[word:shagagofoj|shagagofoj]] || [[word:shagagofosh|shagagofosh]] || [[word:shagagof|shagagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagag忙th忙|shagag忙th忙]] || [[word:shagag忙j忙|shagag忙j忙]] || [[word:shagag忙sh忙|shagag忙sh忙]] || [[word:shagag忙|shagag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagagathath|shagagathath]] || [[word:shagagajaj|shagagajaj]] || [[word:shagagashash|shagagashash]] || [[word:shagag|shagag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagagatha|shagagatha]] || [[word:shagagaja|shagagaja]] || [[word:shagagasha|shagagasha]] || [[word:shagaga|shagaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagagafath|shagagafath]] || [[word:shagagafaj|shagagafaj]] || [[word:shagagafash|shagagafash]] || [[word:shagagaf|shagagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shagagasha|shagagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagagasha|goshagagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagagasha|gokishagagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shagagn眉sha|shagagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagagnkn眉sha|goshagagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagn眉sha|gokishagagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagagsh毛sha|shagagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagagnksh毛sha|goshagagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagagsh毛sha|gokishagagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagrosha|shagagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagnkrosha|goshagagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagrosha|gokishagagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagmusha|shagagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagnkmusha|goshagagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagmusha|gokishagagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagagsherasha|shagagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagagnksherasha|goshagagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagagsherasha|gokishagagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagagngasha|shagagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagagnkngasha|goshagagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagagngasha|gokishagagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagagyasha|shagagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagagnkyasha|goshagagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagagyasha|gokishagagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagagyamasha|shagagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagagnkyamasha|goshagagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagagyamasha|gokishagagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagn眉sh毛sha|shagagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagnkn眉sh毛sha|goshagagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagn眉sh毛sha|gokishagagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagn眉rosha|shagagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagnkn眉rosha|goshagagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagn眉rosha|gokishagagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagn眉musha|shagagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagnkn眉musha|goshagagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagn眉musha|gokishagagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagsh毛n眉sha|shagagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagnksh毛n眉sha|goshagagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagsh毛n眉sha|gokishagagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagsh毛rosha|shagagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagnksh毛rosha|goshagagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagsh毛rosha|gokishagagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagsh毛musha|shagagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagnksh毛musha|goshagagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagsh毛musha|gokishagagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagron眉sha|shagagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagnkron眉sha|goshagagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagron眉sha|gokishagagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagrosh毛sha|shagagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagnkrosh毛sha|goshagagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagrosh毛sha|gokishagagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagromusha|shagagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagnkromusha|goshagagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagromusha|gokishagagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagagmun眉sha|shagagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagagnkmun眉sha|goshagagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagagmun眉sha|gokishagagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagagmush毛sha|shagagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagagnkmush毛sha|goshagagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagagmush毛sha|gokishagagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagagmurosha|shagagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagagnkmurosha|goshagagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagagmurosha|gokishagagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shagag|shagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙g忙g|sh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshagag|hoshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙g忙g|hosh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshagag|hohoshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙g忙g|hohosh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shagag|n眉shagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙g忙g|n眉sh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shagag|n眉n眉shagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙g忙g|n眉n眉sh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shagag|n茂shagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙g忙g|n茂sh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shagag|n茂n茂shagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙g忙g|n茂n茂sh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushagag|lushagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙g忙g|lush忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushagag|lulushagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙g忙g|lulush忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishagag|lishagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙g忙g|lish忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishagag|lilishagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙g忙g|lilish忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshagag|koshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙g忙g|kosh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshagag|kokoshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙g忙g|kokosh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshagag|keshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙g忙g|kesh忙g忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshagag|kekeshagag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙g忙g|kekesh忙g忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
